title: EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive 250ml - Multipurpose High-Strength Contact Glue - Bonds Instantly - Fast Drying
features: High strength, multipurpose adhesive that bonds instantly on contact
Powerful enough to bond most materials, including non-porous surfaces e.g. metal to metal
The ideal adhesive for DIY tasks and emergency repairs
Suitable materials: Wood, MDF, laminate, metal, PVC, cork, leather, rubber, glass, mirror, stone, and ceramics
description: From the manufacturer Instant bonding for all your projects EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive is a high-strength, multipurpose adhesive that bonds instantly on contact. Ideal for a wide range of DIY tasks and household repairs, it provides a strong bond in minutes and can be roughly handled or machined in just 30 minutes. Effortless bonding for every project EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive is perfect for bonding wood, MDF, laminate, metal, PVC, cork, leather, rubber, glass, mirror, stone, and ceramics. Whether you're fixing household items, working on DIY projects, or making repairs, this adhesive ensures a reliable bond. It's ideal for both porous and non-porous surfaces, making it versatile for various applications. Simple application for reliable esults Using EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive is straightforward. Ensure surfaces are dry, clean, and free from dust and grease. Apply a thin, even coat to both surfaces and let it become touch dry (20 minutes). Align and press surfaces together firmly. For porous surfaces, apply a thin coat to the least porous surface and press together immediately. Allow 24 hours for full strength. Advantages STRONG BOND: Bonds on contact so no need for clamping or support. QUICK HANDLING: Can be roughly handled or machined in 30 minutes. MULTI-MATERIAL USE: Bonds wood, metal, PVC, cork, leather, and more. EASY APPLICATION: Simple to apply with a spreader, spatula, or brush. NON-RUSTING: Will not rust, ensuring long-lasting durability.
